content.json:
# Trustee Matching Analytics

Comprehensive metrics tracking trustee matching performance across all 5 matching scenarios:
- Auto-match with exact criteria
- High confidence match (verification required)
- Multiple matches - no clear winner
- Exact match with inactive status
- No match found

Powered by telemetry from `SYNC-TRUSTEE-APPOINTMENTS` dataflow and `TrusteeMatchVerificationResolved` events.

---
## Overview Dashboard
Key performance indicators and scenario distribution across all trustee matching outcomes.

content.query:
app('{DataflowsAppInsights:name}').customMetrics
| where name == "TrusteeAutoMatchRate"
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize CurrentRate = avg(value)
| project Metric = "Auto-Match Rate", CurrentRate
content.title: Auto-Match Performance
Median Manual Verification Time

content.query:
app('{DataflowsAppInsights:name}').customEvents
| where name == "DataflowHandlerComplete"
| where tostring(customDimensions["moduleName"]) == "SYNC-TRUSTEE-APPOINTMENTS"
| extend 
    Auto = tolong(customDimensions["autoMatchCount"]),
    High = tolong(customDimensions["highConfidenceMatchCount"]),
    Multi = tolong(customDimensions["multipleMatchCount"]),
    Imperfect = tolong(customDimensions["imperfectMatchCount"]),
    None = tolong(customDimensions["noMatchCount"])
| summarize 
    AutoMatch = sum(Auto),
    HighConfidence = sum(High),
    MultipleMatch = sum(Multi),
    ImperfectMatch = sum(Imperfect),
    NoMatch = sum(None)
// This is the magic part for Pie Charts
| evaluate narrow()
| project Scenario = Column, Count = tolong(Value)
| where Count > 0
content.title: Scenario Distribution (%)

content.query:
app('{DataflowsAppInsights:name}').customEvents
| where name == "DataflowHandlerComplete"
| where tostring(customDimensions["moduleName"]) == "SYNC-TRUSTEE-APPOINTMENTS"
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend 
    AutoMatch = tolong(customDimensions["autoMatchCount"]),
    HighConfidence = tolong(customDimensions["highConfidenceMatchCount"]),
    MultipleMatch = tolong(customDimensions["multipleMatchCount"]),
    ImperfectMatch = tolong(customDimensions["imperfectMatchCount"]),
    NoMatch = tolong(customDimensions["noMatchCount"])
| summarize 
    AutoMatch = sum(AutoMatch),
    HighConfidence = sum(HighConfidence),
    MultipleMatch = sum(MultipleMatch),
    InactiveStatus = sum(ImperfectMatch),
    NoMatch = sum(NoMatch)
    by Day = bin(timestamp, 1d)
| order by Day asc
content.title: Scenario Distribution Over Time

content.json:
---
## Time Metrics Deep Dive
Resolution time analysis across all scenarios and resolution paths.

content.query:
app('{NodeApiAppInsights:name}').customEvents
| where name == "TrusteeMatchVerificationResolved"
| where customDimensions.action == "approve" or customDimensions.action == "reject"
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend 
    mismatchReason = tostring(customDimensions.mismatchReason),
    resolutionPath = tostring(customDimensions.resolutionPath),
    resolutionMs = todouble(customMeasurements.resolutionMs)
| extend 
    Scenario = case(
        mismatchReason == "HIGH_CONFIDENCE_MATCH", "High Confidence",
        mismatchReason == "MULTIPLE_TRUSTEE_MATCH", "Multiple Matches",
        mismatchReason == "INACTIVE_PERFECT_MATCH", "Inactive Status",
        mismatchReason == "NO_TRUSTEE_MATCH", "No Match",
        "Other"
    ),
    ResolutionPath = case(
        resolutionPath == "accepted", "Accepted",
        resolutionPath == "manual-search", "Accepted After Manual Search",
        resolutionPath == "escalated", "Rejected",
        "Unknown"
    )
| where Scenario != "Other"
| summarize 
    Median = percentile(resolutionMs, 50) / 1000,
    Avg = avg(resolutionMs) / 1000,
    Count = count()
    by Scenario, ResolutionPath
| order by Scenario asc, ResolutionPath asc
content.title: Resolution Time by Scenario

content.query:
app('{NodeApiAppInsights:name}').customEvents
| where name == "TrusteeMatchVerificationResolved"
| where customDimensions.action == "approve" or customDimensions.action == "reject"
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend 
    mismatchReason = tostring(customDimensions.mismatchReason),
    resolutionMs = todouble(customMeasurements.resolutionMs)
| extend 
    Story = case(
        mismatchReason == "HIGH_CONFIDENCE_MATCH", "High Confidence",
        mismatchReason == "MULTIPLE_TRUSTEE_MATCH", "Multiple Matches",
        mismatchReason == "INACTIVE_PERFECT_MATCH", "Inactive Perfect Match",
        mismatchReason == "NO_TRUSTEE_MATCH", "No Match",
        "Other"
    )
| where Story != "Other"
| summarize MedianResolutionSeconds = percentile(resolutionMs, 50) / 1000 by Day = bin(timestamp, 1d), Story
| order by Day asc
content.title: Resolution Time Trend by Scenario

content.json:
---
## Accuracy & Quality Metrics
Tracking match accuracy, confirmation rates, and data quality trends.

content.query:
app('{NodeApiAppInsights:name}').customEvents
| where name == "TrusteeMatchVerificationResolved"
| where customDimensions.mismatchReason == "HIGH_CONFIDENCE_MATCH"
| where customDimensions.action == "approve"
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend wasPreselectedConfirmed = tobool(customDimensions.wasPreselectedConfirmed)
| summarize 
    Confirmed = countif(wasPreselectedConfirmed == true), 
    Rejected = countif(wasPreselectedConfirmed == false) 
| extend Total = Confirmed + Rejected
| extend ConfirmationRate = round((todouble(Confirmed) / todouble(Total)) * 100, 1) 
| project ConfirmationRate, Confirmed, Rejected, Total
content.title: High Confidence Suggested Match Confirmed

content.query:
app('{DataflowsAppInsights:name}').customMetrics
| where name == "TrusteeAutoMatchRate"
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize AutoMatchRate = avg(value) by Day = bin(timestamp, 1d)
| order by Day asc
content.title: Auto-Match Rate Over Time

content.json:
---
## Behavior Analysis
Candidate selection patterns and distribution for high confidence matches and multiple matches.
We expect the Rank 1 trustee to be seleted, otherwise we may need to re-visit our fuzzy matching logic.

content.query:
app('{NodeApiAppInsights:name}').customEvents
| where name == "TrusteeMatchVerificationResolved"
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend 
    mismatchReason = tostring(customDimensions.mismatchReason),
    candidateCount = toint(customMeasurements.candidateCount)
| where mismatchReason == "HIGH_CONFIDENCE_MATCH" or mismatchReason == "MULTIPLE_TRUSTEE_MATCH"
| extend 
    Scenario = iff(mismatchReason == "HIGH_CONFIDENCE_MATCH", "High Confidence", "Multiple Matches"),
    CandidateCountBucket = case(
        candidateCount == 1, "1",
        candidateCount == 2, "2",
        candidateCount == 3, "3",
        candidateCount == 4, "4",
        candidateCount >= 5, "5+",
        "Unknown"
    )
| where CandidateCountBucket != "Unknown"
| summarize Count = count() by Scenario, CandidateCountBucket
| order by Scenario asc, CandidateCountBucket asc
content.title: How Many Candidates Did the System Find Per Scenario?

content.query:
app('{NodeApiAppInsights:name}').customEvents
| where name == "TrusteeMatchVerificationResolved"
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend 
    mismatchReason = tostring(customDimensions.mismatchReason),
    candidateCount = toint(customMeasurements.candidateCount)
| where mismatchReason == "HIGH_CONFIDENCE_MATCH" or mismatchReason == "MULTIPLE_TRUSTEE_MATCH"
| extend Scenario = iff(mismatchReason == "HIGH_CONFIDENCE_MATCH", "High Confidence", "Multiple Matches")
| summarize 
    MedianCount = percentile(candidateCount, 50),
    AvgCount = avg(candidateCount),
    MaxCount = max(candidateCount),
    TotalEvents = count()
    by Scenario
content.title: Median & Average Candidates Presented Per Scenario

content.query:
app('{NodeApiAppInsights:name}').customEvents
| where name == "TrusteeMatchVerificationResolved"
| where customDimensions.action == "approve"
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend 
    mismatchReason = tostring(customDimensions.mismatchReason),
    selectedCandidateRank = toint(customDimensions.selectedCandidateRank)
| where mismatchReason == "HIGH_CONFIDENCE_MATCH" or mismatchReason == "MULTIPLE_TRUSTEE_MATCH"
| extend 
    Story = iff(mismatchReason == "HIGH_CONFIDENCE_MATCH", "High Confidence", "Multiple Matches"),
    Rank = case(
        selectedCandidateRank == 1, "1st",
        selectedCandidateRank == 2, "2nd",
        selectedCandidateRank == 3, "3rd",
        selectedCandidateRank >= 4, "4th+",
        "Unknown"
    )
| where Rank != "Unknown"
| summarize Count = count() by Story, Rank
| order by Story asc, Rank asc
content.title: Which Candidate Rank Did the User Pick?
